approvalSource: Steve approved unattended Foundation-only continuation and requested a final sprint closeout/readiness decision before any builder split.
scopeSummary: Close the Foundation-only sprint only if live System Health, repeated-failure gate, backlog hygiene, Current Sprint truth, required sprint cards, and main integration are clean; record continuous Foundation Builder readiness and defer full Value Builder split until a clean overnight/morning cycle or explicit Steve approval.
constraints: Foundation-only closeout; do not start Value Builder split from this card alone.
Use live System Health, repeated-failure gate, backlog hygiene, Current Sprint truth, and git main truth.
Do not call classified broken workflow failures green.
Do not approve broad private extraction, sends, external writes, Drive/Gmail/Missive permission mutation, credential mutation, provider config changes, paid/provider access, or browser-auth work.
Existing governed Foundation repair/proof reruns are allowed only when they read approved source data and write local archive/ledger/proof rows only.
Approval-bound actions park the action, not the whole sprint; continue safe approved sprint work.
Each card must close with focused proof, System Health, repeated-failure gate, backlog hygiene, foundation:verify, process:foundation-ship, and clean pushed main.
